name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: Karpathy-inspired coding guidelines for Codex. Use them to surface assumptions, avoid overengineering, make surgical changes, and define verifiable success criteria.

interface.longDescription: A Codex-first plugin that packages Karpathy-inspired guidelines for surfacing assumptions, preferring simpler solutions, keeping edits surgical, and working against concrete verification criteria.
defaultPrompt: Use Karpathy Guidelines while reviewing this change for hidden assumptions and unnecessary complexity.
Apply Karpathy Guidelines before implementing this task and give me a short verification plan.
